Author: James
Name: Housing NPC Pose
Punchline: Client-side housing NPC pose automation with visual Y offsets and nameplate hiding.
Description: v0.3.4 test build. Lists visible housing NPC/object candidates, blocks known non-humanoid creature NPCs, applies confirmed useful local pose values, saves local pose assignments plus optional visual Y offsets for matching NPCs in the current area, optionally auto-applies them after zoning/plugin load, and can hide nameplates for posed/saved NPCs. Client-side only: no packets, spawning, server-side movement, hooks, or effects on other clients.
